reviewer: scrutiny-validator (self-review, subagent failed due to permissions)

codeQuality.notes: Timer-based summarization loop with proper cancellation in teardown. Smart transcript trimming from start preserving recent content with clean line boundary detection. Tool call previews properly truncated to ~50 chars. Previous summary continuity maintained. In-progress lock prevents overlapping runs.

issues.description: Same LLM provider duplication as noted in session-auto-naming review. The _call_summarization_llm method duplicates the provider instantiation logic from _infer_session_name.
issues.suggestion: See session-auto-naming review - extract shared _get_llm_agent() helper

testCoverage.notes: 12 backend tests covering DB schema, API endpoint, LLM call orchestration, transcript trimming, tool previews, disabled state, previous summary continuity. Frontend reducer and SessionDetailPage tests also added.
